jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Snapdeal
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Snapdeal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Snapdeal:
Snapdeal is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal!
